title: Data not passing from main workflow to sub-workflow
symptom: The sub-workflow shows 'query: null' when it should receive data from the main workflow.
applies_when: Using sub-workflow to process data from main workflow
Main workflow sends a Telegram ID
not_this_if: Sub-workflow is configured to accept all data
root_cause: The sub-workflow may not recognize the incoming data structure if it hasn't been initialized with valid input. This can lead to it not processing the data correctly, resulting in 'query: null'.
fix_steps: Configure the sub-workflow node to accept all incoming data.
Inspect the execution logs to analyze the JSON payload being sent.
Set the analyzed JSON payload as mock data in the sub-workflow.
Unpin the mock data to allow the sub-workflow to learn the expected structure.
agent_instruction: Ensure the sub-workflow is initialized with valid mock input to recognize the data schema.
